---
title: "Kuntavaalit 2025"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: [litera, custom.scss]
    scrolling: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:teromeh@proton.me
      - icon: house
        href: ../index.html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
#| cache: true
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

data <- readRDS("df.rds")
elected <- readRDS("elected.rds")

party_colors <- c(
  "SDP" = "#F54B4B",
  "KOK" = "#003A54",
  "KESK" = "#3BAD2E",
  "VIHR" = "#76B72A",
  "VAS" = "#F00A64",
  "PS" = "#002395",
  "RKP" = "#ffdc5d",
  "KD" = "#118DFF",
  "LIIK" = "#cf83c8",
  "Muut" = "#000000"
)

title_font <- list(family = "Outfit, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a")

party_data <- data |>
  group_by(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi) |>
  summarise(total_votes = sum(aanet_yhteensa_lkm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(percentage = (total_votes / sum(total_votes)) * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(total_votes)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(
    label = paste0(format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %")
  )

party_data <- party_data |>
  mutate(party_bold = paste0("<b>", puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, "</b>"))

age_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  count(ika_vaalipaivana, name = "maara")

age_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  count(ika_vaalipaivana, name = "maara")

gender_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, sukupuoli) |>
  count(sukupuoli, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(
    total = sum(maara),
    percentage = (maara / total) * 100,
    label = paste0(format(maara, big.mark = " "), " (",
                   format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %)")
  )

gender_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, sukupuoli) |>
  count(sukupuoli, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(
    total = sum(maara),
    percentage = (maara / total) * 100,
    label = paste0(format(maara, big.mark = " "), " (",
                   format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %)")
  )

occupation_all <- data |>
  mutate(ammatti = trimws(ammatti)) |>
  filter(!is.na(ammatti), ammatti != "") |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, ammatti) |>
  count(ammatti, name = "maara") |>
  arrange(desc(maara)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(label = format(maara, big.mark = " "))

occupation_elected <- elected |>
  mutate(ammatti = trimws(ammatti)) |>
  filter(!is.na(ammatti), ammatti != "") |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, ammatti) |>
  count(ammatti, name = "maara") |>
  arrange(desc(maara)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(label = format(maara, big.mark = " "))

avg_age_all <- data |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  summarise(avg = round(mean(ika_vaalipaivana, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) |>
  pull(avg)

avg_age_elected <- elected |>
  distinct(ehdokasnumero, kotikunnan_nimi_suomeksi, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  summarise(avg = round(mean(ika_vaalipaivana, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) |>
  pull(avg)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: party-chart
plot_ly(party_data,
        x = ~percentage,
        y = ~reorder(party_bold, percentage),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        color = ~puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi,
        colors = party_colors,
        hovertext = ~paste0(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, ": ",
                    format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %",
                    "<br>Ääniä yhteensä: ", 
                    format(total_votes, big.mark = " ")),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Äänijakauma - Puolueet</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", 
                  family = "Inter, sans-serif",
                  size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", 
             range = c(0, max(party_data$percentage) * 1.3),
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             showticklabels = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "",
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             ticklabelposition = "outside",
             ticklen = 10,
             tickcolor = "white",
             tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 14, 
                             family = "Inter, sans-serif",
                             weight = "bold")),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(party_data), function(i) {
      list(
        x = party_data$percentage[i],
        y = party_data$party_bold[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", party_data$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13, 
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      ) 
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: age-all
plot_ly(age_all,
        x = ~ika_vaalipaivana,
        y = ~maara,
        type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#00BCD4"),
        hovertext = ~paste0("Ikä: ", ika_vaalipaivana, " vuotta<br>",
                            "Ehdokkaita: ", maara),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Ikäjakauma - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "Ikä", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), dtick = 10),
    yaxis = list(title = "Ehdokkaiden määrä", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE, tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = list(
      list(
        x = max(age_all$ika_vaalipaivana),
        y = max(age_all$maara),
        text = paste0("Keskiarvo: <b>", format(avg_age_all, decimal.mark = ","), "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "right",
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 12,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    )
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: age-elected
plot_ly(age_elected,
        x = ~ika_vaalipaivana,
        y = ~maara,
        type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#D81B60"),
        hovertext = ~paste0("Ikä: ", ika_vaalipaivana, " vuotta<br>",
                            "Valittuja: ", maara),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Ikäjakauma - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "Ikä", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13), dtick = 10),
    yaxis = list(title = "Valittujen määrä", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE, tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = list(
      list(
        x = max(age_elected$ika_vaalipaivana),
        y = max(age_elected$maara),
        text = paste0("Keskiarvo: <b>", format(avg_age_elected, decimal.mark = ","), "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "right",
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 12,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    )
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row {height="180px"}

### Column

```{r}
#| label: gender-all
plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_all |> filter(sukupuoli == "Mies"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#5b6e7c"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Miehet: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_all |> filter(sukupuoli == "Nainen"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#00BCD4"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Naiset: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    title = list(text = "<b>Sukupuolijakauma - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>",
                 font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showticklabels = FALSE, range = c(0, 100)),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: gender-elected
plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_elected |> filter(sukupuoli == "Mies"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#5b6e7c"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Miehet: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = gender_elected |> filter(sukupuoli == "Nainen"),
    x = ~percentage,
    y = ~"",
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    marker = list(color = "#D81B60"),
    hoverinfo = "none",
    text = ~paste0("<b>Naiset: ", format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %</b>"),
    textposition = "inside",
    insidetextanchor = "middle",
    insidetextfont = list(color = "white", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
  ) |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    title = list(text = "<b>Sukupuolijakauma - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>",
                 font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showticklabels = FALSE, range = c(0, 100)),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: occupation-all
plot_ly(occupation_all,
        x = ~maara,
        y = ~reorder(ammatti, maara),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = "#00BCD4"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(ammatti, ": ", format(maara, big.mark = " "), " ehdokasta"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Yleisimmät ammatit - Kaikki ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 ticklabelposition = "outside",
                 ticklen = 10,
                 tickcolor = "white",
                 tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                                 family = "Inter, sans-serif")),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(occupation_all), function(i) {
      list(
        x = occupation_all$maara[i],
        y = occupation_all$ammatti[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", occupation_all$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: occupation-elected
plot_ly(occupation_elected,
        x = ~maara,
        y = ~reorder(ammatti, maara),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = "#D81B60"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(ammatti, ": ", format(maara, big.mark = " "), " valittua"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Yleisimmät ammatit - Valitut ehdokkaat</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 showline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE,
                 ticklabelposition = "outside",
                 ticklen = 10,
                 tickcolor = "white",
                 tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                                 family = "Inter, sans-serif")),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(occupation_elected), function(i) {
      list(
        x = occupation_elected$maara[i],
        y = occupation_elected$ammatti[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", occupation_elected$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13,
                    family = "Inter, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

```{r}
#| label: footer
#| output: asis
cat('<p style="font-size: 12px; color: #999999; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; text-align: right; padding: 0.5rem 1rem;">
Data: Oikeusministeriö, Tieto- ja tulospalvelu
</p>')
```
